hero.title: Fast way to learn new language
hero.p1: Pop Up is a language-learning tool that employs modern methods and techniques—the very same ones the app's creator used to learn two languages in seven months and continues to use actively today.
hero.p2: The web application is still under development. You can help the project by donations which are actively accepted.
cards: Learn words using flashcards. Shuffle the word cards and gain a new experience.
Everyone can learn a language in the way that suits them best. Localization for everyone.
Practice your pronunciation with AI. The site also offers plenty of practice exercises for every situation.

sections.heading: How does it work
paragraphs: Pick a language, get a ready-made deck, and start learning in minutes.
Review words with flashcards, then practice speaking and listening until they stick.

cards.title: Pick a language
cards.text: Choose from twelve languages and jump straight into a starter deck.

cards.title: Study flashcards
cards.text: Flip, shuffle, and repeat cards until every word feels familiar.

cards.title: Track progress
cards.text: See what you have learned and what still needs another round.

sections.heading: Method
paragraphs: Spaced repetition brings cards back exactly when you are about to forget them.
Localization lets everyone learn in the way that suits them best, at their own pace.

cards.title: Spaced repetition
cards.text: Cards resurface right before you forget, so review time is never wasted.

cards.title: Localization
cards.text: Interface and explanations adapt to your native language.

cards.title: Daily goals
cards.text: Small, steady goals keep the habit going without burnout.

sections.heading: Flashcards
paragraphs: Shuffle the deck for a fresh order every session and keep your memory on its toes.
Practice pronunciation with AI and turn passive words into ones you can actually say.

cards.title: Shuffle mode
cards.text: Randomize the order so you learn the word, not its position.

cards.title: AI pronunciation
cards.text: Hear and compare your pronunciation against a native model.

cards.title: Custom decks
cards.text: Build your own decks from the words that matter to you.

languagePage.pickTopic: Pick a topic on the right →

auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one digit
auth.notVerified: Email not verified — sign up email required

profile.signInMessage: Sign in to track your activity streak, learning languages and profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.providerHint: Use your own API key, or leave Default to use the app's.
